channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Silent Hill: Townfall looks to be a PS5 console launch exclusive, according to official website - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Silent Hill: Townfall looks to be a PS5 console launch exclusive, according to official website  Eurogamer
  2. Silent Hill: Townfall Will Skip Xbox Consoles At Launch  GameSpot
  3. Another Upcoming Konami Game Is PS5 Exclusive, Fans Upset  PlayStation LifeStyle
  4. A first-person walk around a foggy Scottish town in the 90s: Silent Hill: Townfall is certainly serious about instilling dread  Rock Paper Shotgun
  5. Silent Hill: Townfall Is Now Available to Pre-Order  Restart.run

item.title: The Metal Gear Solid 4 Remaster Can Finally Deliver On The Promise Of Its Earliest PS3 Demo - Digital Foundry
item.description:
1. The Metal Gear Solid 4 Remaster Can Finally Deliver On The Promise Of Its Earliest PS3 Demo  Digital Foundry

  4. Metal Gear Solid 4 returns in Master Collection Vol. 2, and its graphics story is wild  Creative Bloq
  5. Is your PC ready for Metal Gear Solid 4?  OC3D

item.title: ‘This Time It’s Different,’ Says Daniel Ives About Apple Stock (AAPL) - TipRanks
item.description:
1. ‘This Time It’s Different,’ Says Daniel Ives About Apple Stock (AAPL)  TipRanks

  4. Apple’s Latest Attempt to Launch New Siri Runs Into Snags  Bloomberg

item.title: Diablo II’s new Warlock is a great excuse to revisit a classic game - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Diablo II’s new Warlock is a great excuse to revisit a classic game  Ars Technica
  2. Catch Up on the Diablo 30th Anniversary Spotlight — Diablo Immortal  Blizzard News

  4. Diablo 2’s Warlock is unlike anything the game has done in 26 years  Polygon
  5. Path of Exile creator praises Diablo 2's Warlock update while calling it a 'strategic mistake'  TweakTown

item.title: iOS 27 will bring Liquid Glass changes, and I’m excited for one reason - 9to5Mac
item.description:

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration - Nintendo Life

item.title: UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence" - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence"  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Call of Duty Black Ops 7 ad banned for trivialising sexual violence  BBC
  3. Call of Duty ad banned in the UK for trivializing sexual violence  Game Developer
  4. Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Commercial Featuring Nikki Glazer Receives UK Ban for Trivializing Sexual Violence  IGN
  5. Video game advert banned for glorifying sexual violence  The Independent
